code:
# EVOLVE-BLOCK-START
<System>
<Role>You are a sentiment classification model for Amazon Home & Kitchen product reviews.</Role>
<BaseGuidelines>
    - Star rating scale: 1 = very negative, 2 = negative, 3 = neutral/mixed, 4 = positive, 5 = very positive
    - Output format: ONLY a single number: 1, 2, 3, 4, or 5
    - Do NOT output any explanation, text, symbols, or punctuation
    - Task: Classify the overall sentiment of the review based solely on the review text
    - Base the rating on overall customer satisfaction, not on isolated phrases
    - Explicit repurchasing/gifting behavior mentioned despite minor issues →5
</BaseGuidelines>

<DynamicRules>
    STAR LEVEL CRITERIA:

    1 Star (Very Negative):
    - Strong dissatisfaction or safety hazards
    - Complete failure/defects with warnings against purchase
    - Multiple unresolved issues overriding any positives →1
    - Returns/refund requests with safety concerns →1

    2 Stars (Negative):
    - Functional with critical flaws affecting regular use
    - Requires significant workarounds negating core value →2
    - Short lifespan despite proper care/maintenance →2

    3 Stars (Neutral/Mixed):
    - Balanced pros/cons without clear dominance
    - Temporary solutions needing imminent replacement →3
    - "Adequate but..." statements with explicit compromises →3

    4 Stars (Positive):
    - Clear recommendation with SPECIFIC usage constraints
    - Material tradeoffs requiring special handling →4
    - Secondary feature excellence with core limitations →4
    - Requires behavior modifications (portion control, careful stacking) →4
    - Partial functionality needing complementary products →4
    - "Great for X but not Y" patterns →4
    - Continued use of alternatives for edge cases →4

    5 Stars (Very Positive):
    - Unqualified endorsement despite inherent characteristics
    - Long-term validation through sustained daily use →5
    - Transforms user experience through core functionality →5
    - Inherent limitations accepted as product essence →5
    - Direct competitor comparisons with clear preference →5
    - No alternatives needed for intended purpose →5

    EDGE CASE CLARIFICATIONS:
    - Usage precautions →4 | Optimization tips →5
    - Core limitation →4 | Inherited trait →5
    - "Love but need alternatives" →4 | "Love despite traits" →5
    - Partial solution →4 | Complete solution →5
    - Material compromises →4 | Material authenticity →5
</DynamicRules>

<FewShotExamples>

Example 1 (Gold 4):
Review: "Perfect snack bags if you avoid overfilling! Still use Ziplocs for liquids."
Rating: 4

Example 2 (Gold 5):
Review: "Cotton wrinkles naturally but creates perfect table settings. Our permanent choice!"
Rating: 5

Example 3 (Gold 4):
Review: "Vibrant curtains fade faster than premium brands but transform room lighting."
Rating: 4

Example 4 (Gold 5):
Review: "Heavier than plastic alternatives, but this stainless steel bowl lasts forever."
Rating: 5

Example 5 (Gold 4):
Review: "Collapsible bins great for seasonal storage - reinforce corners for heavy items."
Rating: 4

Example 6 (Gold 5):
Review: "Learning curve pays off - makes best espresso I've ever had at home!"
Rating: 5

Example 7 (Gold 4):
Review: "Glass lids chip if stacked carelessly, but perfect visibility for pantry items."
Rating: 4

Example 8 (Gold 5):
Review: "Thinner than cast iron but performs equally well. My forever skillet!"
Rating: 5

Example 9 (Gold 4):
Review: "Ideal for dry storage if you avoid microwaving. Use plastic for reheating."
Rating: 4

Example 10 (Gold 5):
Review: "Updates: 3 years daily use. Wobbly handle reminds me it's still going strong!"
Rating: 5

</FewShotExamples>

<Task>
Review: {review}
Rating:
</Task>
# EVOLVE-BLOCK-END
artifacts_json:
{"error_examples": "RULE COVERAGE:
  1 star: OK
  2 star: OK
  3 star: OK
  4 star: OK
  5 star: OK
  All categories covered.

ERROR DISTRIBUTION (25 total misclassified):
  gold 4 -> 5: 12
  gold 5 -> 4: 7
  gold 4 -> 3: 3
  gold 3 -> 4: 1
  gold 1 -> 2: 1

MISCLASSIFIED EXAMPLES (your prompt got these wrong):
  1. Review: "The shade of blue this set is done in is even more vibrant in person. Online it looks really good, but in hand it pops so much more. I got this set for setting up on my son's bed and it made his entire room look better. It replaced a more muted grey ..."
     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 5 | Workers: [5, 4, 5] | Disagreement: 0.17
  2. Review: "this everyday throw is soft and cuddly and will get lots of use from your family. They will be covering up in this throw because it is warm. It is also nice looking. The chevron pattern is up to date and the colors go with many decors. This throw is ..."
     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 5 | Workers: [5, 4, 5] | Disagreement: 0.17
  3. Review: "I bought one of those Pyrex sets a few years ago.  You know, the one that came with the blue lids and some of the containers were rectangular --large and small-- while others were round (like these).  Well, turns out that the ones I used the most wer..."
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 4 | Workers: [5, 4, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17
  4. Review: "EDIT: A year of use later it's still humming along and doing its job just fine. Sometimes it seems like it doesn't pick up quickly that it should be upping its speed on its own in the auto setting, but maybe it's just taking longer for the air to rea..."
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 4 | Workers: [5, 4, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17
  5. Review: "This is a good tablecloth if you have kids. It wipes clean because it is vinyl. It also has a nice royal blue color with white polka dots. Very retro. This is great for outdoor use but you can easily use it indoors. After it isn't as new looking but ..."
     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 5 | Workers: [5, 4, 5] | Disagreement: 0.17
  6. Review: "Grunds bathmat is 100% certified organic cotton  with the main section being long straight cotton fibers and it has three stripes of loops on each end. This fiber is not treated with bleach, formaldehyde,  or any other harmful toxic substances. This ..."
     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 3 | Workers: [4, 3, 3] | Disagreement: 0.17
  7. Review: "Frankly I'm a bit at odds with these sheets but overall, ended up happy...with reservations. Growing up there was only one type of sheet...my mother, my grandmother and my great grandmother all swore by JC Penny percale sheets. Over the years I've tr..."
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 4 | Workers: [4, 3, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17

BORDERLINE EXAMPLES (correct but workers disagreed):
  1. Review: "I like the Stasher Snack bag. It is the perfect size for snacks on the go. I also like that you can store, cook, put in the microwave or even in the dishwasher! This is great for small treats. Don't try to overstuff. You don't want the seal to get fo..."
     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 4 | Workers: [5, 4, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17
  2. Review: "This is a coffee pot for coffee geeks.  Most discerning coffee aficionados likely wouldn't notice much if any difference from a a great less complicated coffee make, such as a Bonavita.  To cut to the point, this probably isn't for you, but who knows..."
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 5 | Workers: [5, 5, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17
  3. Review: "This is a sharp well made tablecloth.  It's strengths are the vibrant colors, sharp contrast, and solid construction.  The cons are just the inherent need to iron it that comes from the cotton."
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 5 | Workers: [5, 5, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17

Summary: 25 errors, 10 borderline out of 54 examples."}
